summary: Solid test suite covering all major functions and requirement scenarios. Strengths: comprehensive testing of Get-CurrentVersion, Get-BumpType, Get-NextVersion with good happy paths and basic error cases; well-organized with clear Describe/Context/It structure; integration tests verify end-to-end flow. Weaknesses: CHANGELOG append behavior with existing content only minimally tested; missing edge cases (multiple BREAKING CHANGE footers, malformed JSON, scope special characters, very large version numbers); fixture files referenced but not self-contained in test code; cleanup patterns could be more robust (no finally blocks). Would reliably catch regressions in core version bumping and file I/O logic but miss some corner cases.
